tags.description: Magnolia Hill (Sesame Bair) is 82 m high, located above the eponymous Balchik street. Remains of inhabited in the Bulgarian Middle Ages similar to those of the fortified Bulgarian settlement on the neighboring hill Echo (Jenny Bair) - the main of the five
tags.name: Хълм Магнолия (Сусам баир)

tags.description: Ostrovrah hill collapsed into the sea gradually. At its bottom, there was one of the most beautiful villas of Balchik, named "Ghiul-hane". Designed by the Romanian architect Henrieta Delavrancea-Gibory, it was built in 1935. It collapsed in the '70s.
